name: Currency and Tax Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product prices have three options related to tax:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tax inclusive - the price of the product includes tax."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tax exclusive - the product price does not include tax."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tax free - tax is not charged for this product."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The tax rate and defaults are set in the currency and tax settings. To change your currency and tax settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Currency & tax", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Modify your settings as required. Use the table below as a reference for the settings available."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Country code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The default "}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "ISO two character country code"}]}, {"text": " of your website (e.g. US, AU, NZ)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currency code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "three-letter code for your currency"}]}, {"text": " (e.g. AUD, USD, NZD)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currency symbol"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the currency symbol from the drop down list. If it is not in the list, select Other and enter the symbol in the field."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suburb selector country"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "ISO country code"}]}, {"text": " of the default country used in the suburb selector."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pricing in control panel"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use tax included pricing by default in the control panel."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pricing in webstore"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use tax included pricing in store front and on all invoices."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pricing in POS"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use tax included pricing in Neto by Maropost Point-of-Sale."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tax code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your home country tax code for goods and services\u00a0(e.g. GST, VAT)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tax rate"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your default tax rate for goods and services."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Countries included in default tax zone"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A list of countries that will be charged your default tax rate. Unselected countries that are will not be charged tax."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set internationally shipped orders to tax free"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders with an international shipping address will be defaulted to tax free for each product on the order."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Registered for GST in New Zealand"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select this box to charge GST for orders shipped to New Zealand.
